title: Scorpion slug

'''Scorpion slugs''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]<ref name="DS" /> [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to [[Despayre]],<ref name="CSWE" /> an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion video game">[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]</ref> They were named for the stinger on the end of their [[Limb/Legends|tail]],<ref name="CSWE" /> which could cause [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] of agony for many [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] species until the victim either recovered or [[Death/Legends|perished]]<ref name="DS" /> due to the potent [[Poison/Legends|venom]]. Meanwhile, a [[scorpion/Legends|scorpion]] [[Slug (creature)/Legends|slug's]] sting was usually lethal to smaller creatures.<ref name="CSWE" /> The slugs liked to live among dried [[evergreen]] branches.<ref name="DS" /> By some point between [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]] and [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="DS Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] to between [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]] and [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].</ref> [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] such as [[Celot Ratua Dil]] often used the branches for [[Sleep/Legends|sleeping]] mats, though they frequently changed branches to avoid the creatures. All the scorpion slugs on Despayre perished with the [[Destruction of Despayre|destruction]] of the planet by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]]<ref name="DS" /> in 0 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]].<ref name="TERC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Scorpion slugs were first mentioned in the [[2007]] novel [[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']], written by [[Michael Reaves]] and [[Steve Perry]].<ref name="DS" />
